sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_snowflake_ids (event_time DateTime64(3), snowflake_id UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (event_time);
SELECT event_time, snowflake_id FROM test_snowflake_ids WHERE snowflake_id = dateTime64ToSnowflakeID(toDateTime('2021-01-01 00:00:00.000', 3, 'UTC'));
UPDATE test_snowflake_ids SET snowflake_id = dateTime64ToSnowflakeID(event_time) WHERE event_time < toDateTime('2021-01-01 00:00:00.000', 3, 'UTC');
